title: Leave Management
description: Connect your preferred AI Agent to NocoBase to generate an employee leave management system for leave requests, balances, and more.
description_cn: 链接你常用的 AI Agent，在 NocoBase 中生成员工请假管理系统，覆盖请假申请、年假余额等功能。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Leave Management: a multi-select calendar with pills, a balance dashboard, and a request ledger. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/18-leave-management.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 请假管理:带标签的多选日历、余额看板和请假台账。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/18-leave-management.html
